channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Zigzag markings faded and in poor state, 24th April
item.description:
The school zigzag markings on Rookery Road and Swallow Crescent need repainting in order to help with parking issues and safety for children at drop off and pick up times.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swallow Crescent, Innsworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 24th April
item.description:
ENWD 15db Pothole CW 400x800x90mm approx Road closure with 15db (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loads of smashed up monitor plastic and glass, 24th April
item.description:
I'm guessing kids thought it would be fun to smash it up and leave all the glass and plastic for people to cut their dogs feet on. Please could this area be cleaned up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Fulbrook Close, Springbank, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Massive deep pot hole, 24th April
item.description:
At the end of Elm Street where it meets Swindon Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 292, Swindon Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green or amber traffic light is not working problem, 24th April
item.description:
Police Control report permanent TS to be all out at the location. There are concerns there will be an accident.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Green or amber traffic light is not working
